content.description:
Context menu library. Builds context menu DOM for items with support for interactive mode (with click handlers) and inert mode (for documentation via functional transclusion).

## Exports

- `buildAddChildSubmenu(api, itemId, context)` — Add Child submenu with New Item and Existing Item options
- `buildSimpleActions(api, itemId, context)` — Copy ID, Duplicate, Make Root, Export as JSON, Delete
- `buildItemMenu(api, paramsOrItemId, context?)` — Full menu (partial in Phase 2b)

## Context Object

When `context` is provided, menu items get onclick handlers:
- `onDismiss` — hide the menu
- `parentId` — parent item ID (null if root)
- `rootId` — viewport root ID
- `getClickCoords` — function returning {x, y} or null (for spatial positioning)

When `context` is null (functional transclusion), items are inert.

## Functional Transclusion
